# workflows

GitHub Actions workflow definitions. `ci.yml` runs tests and clippy on pull requests. `deploy-docs.yml` builds and deploys the documentation site. `normalize.yml` runs normalize checks. `release.yml` builds binaries and creates GitHub releases on `v*` tags — uses `musl-gcc` as the linker for the musl matrix entry, builds grammars per-target so musl ships musl-linked `.so` files, runs `cargo fetch -p normalize-grammars` to pull all 98 arborium grammar source crates into the registry for xtask discovery, and bundles a wrapper script + musl libc/loader into the musl tarball for self-contained execution. `publish.yml` publishes all publishable workspace crates to crates.io in topological dependency order via `workflow_run` after `release.yml` succeeds; gracefully skips already-published versions on retry; checks `CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN` is set before any cargo work.
